title: App Settings - General
scenario: Verify that navigating to General via the hamburger menu in Poly Lens app displays Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses sections, and that going back returns to the Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the hamburger menu icon (App Settings) in the top-left corner.
3. From the menu that appears, select "General".
4. Observe the new screen that opens.
5. Verify that the screen displays the following sections: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses.
6. Tap the back button (either the system back button or the back arrow in the app UI).
expected: The General screen opens and displays sections for Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses. Tapping back returns the user to the Poly Lens Menu (Home screen).
